name: Chicken Croquettes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat. Add 3 tablespoons flour and stir until smooth.
2. Cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Gradually add 1/2 cup milk, cooking over medium heat and stirring constantly until the mixture leaves the sides of the pan.
3. Stir in salt and pepper. Remove from heat; stir in mayonnaise and chicken.
4. Cover and chill for 1 hour.
5. Shape the chicken mixture into 6 balls or logs.
6. In a separate bowl, combine egg and 1 tablespoon milk, mixing well.
7. Dredge each croquette first in flour, then dip in the egg mixture, and finally roll in cracker crumbs.
8. Deep-fry the croquettes, one at a time, in hot oil (370 degrees F) for 3 to 5 minutes, or until golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
Yields: 6 servings
